title: Dupas Thomree
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Dupas Thomree |homeworld=[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] |birth= |death=[[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Corellian republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|When the war against the Rebellion started, Thomree kept his side of the bargain. He provided troops and ships for the Emperor. But not long after, Thomree, ah, well, he—he died unexpectedly.''"''
''"''I bet it's a real interesting story how that happened. There might even be more than one version.|Thrackan Sal-Solo and Han Solo|''[[Assault at Selonia]]''}} '''Dupas Thomree''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Diktat]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who lived during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Thomree made a deal with [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] so he could govern the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] as he wished as long as the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] paid taxes, war materiel, and homage to the Emperor while leaving Corellia mostly free of Imperial mandates. He was assassinated in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== The character's name is a playful nod to author [[Roger MacBride Allen]]'s [[Bantam Spectra|Bantam Books]] editor, [[Tom Dupree]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Diktat]] of [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] |years=?-[[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] |before=Eventually [[Shyla Merricope]] |after=[[Daclif Gallamby]] }} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Dupas Thomree }} [[Category:Corellians|Thomree, Dupas]] [[Category:Heads of government and state|Thomree, Dupas]] [[Category:Humans|Thomree, Dupas]] [[Category:Males|Thomree, Dupas]]
